prompt: A photorealistic portrait of a young East Asian woman sitting at a wooden counter in a dimly lit izakaya. She has long wavy black hair and wears a deep red silk button-down shirt, a black mini skirt, sheer black tights, and red high heels. She holds a glass of beer and looks at the camera with a slight pout. The background features blurred patrons and warm glowing paper lanterns. Cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field.
